description: Composition White printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a wide neck with embroidery at neckline, short puff raglan sleeves with gathered, elasticated openings, three button placket with covered buttons, bodice gathered to waistband for shaping at front, long side vents and printed detail at hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which - along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The light colour and print at the hem will lift your mood while the sweet flower embroidery at the neckline will keep you looking feminine. This kurta has a lovely shape created by the puff sleeves and gathered bodice, wear it over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up with bright ethnic jewellery. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
